name: Keyware Solutions Inc.
summary: Keyware Solutions Inc. creates and sells information systems for the support of social infrastructure in Japan. The company offers medical service systems to hospital management analysis systems across examination, nutrition, and medical administration divisions; electronic approval group ware solutions for the preparation of corporate internal work-flows for application and approval routines; corporate internal intellectual property management systems for patent administration and management; and WEB based system that enables the management of advertising in public transportation and supports the sales activities of advertising agencies. It also provides logistics and distribution systems for the preparation of various analysis documentations; operations support systems for temporary staffing and subcontracting industries; template collection for SAP ERP systems for manufacturing companies; package software, which enables the implementation of network management systems to corporations and local governments; and GO-Global, a middleware used as engine to enable server side computing structured as hybrid thin client solutions. In addition, the company offers support services, including creation, implementation, operation, maintenance, and training services, as well as system integration services. It offers its products and services for use in financial services, distribution and logistics, manufacturing, telecommunications, transportation, media, government agencies, medical services, network administration, system monitoring, transmission control, and interface control fields, as well as for service providers. The company was formerly known as Nippon Electronics Development Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Keyware Solutions Inc. in January 2001. Keyware Solutions Inc. was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
